query:
INSERT INTO `Comic`
                    (`id`, `title`, `tagline`, `publish_date`, `is_accurate_publish_date`, `is_guest_comic`, `is_non_canon`, `hidden`)
                VALUES
                    (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 1)
                ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                    `title` = ?,
                    `tagline` = ?,
                    `publish_date` = ?,
                    `is_accurate_publish_date` = ?,
                    `is_guest_comic` = ?,
                    `is_non_canon` = ?,
                    `hidden` = 1
